narration: You're making extra mortgage payments feeling like a total financial genius. But the math says that habit could cost you over a million dollars. Stick around.
visual: SVG house with person silhouette dropping gold coins into a slot in the roof; animated coins fall one by one; large text THE $1,000,000 MISTAKE fades in; amber tag THE MATH WILL SHOCK YOU

narration: Your mortgage charges you around 7% interest, so paying it off early feels like a guaranteed 7% return. Here's exactly where that logic breaks down completely.
visual: SVG mortgage document with INTEREST RATE 7.0% line highlighted in amber; satisfied person silhouette; large amber question mark springs in beside the document

narration: The stock market has averaged 10% a year for over a hundred years. Every dollar going to your mortgage instead of investing loses you that 3% gap — every single year, compounding.
visual: Two animated bar charts side by side: MORTGAGE gray bar at 7%, MARKET amber bar at 10% growing taller; gap arrow labeled +3% EVERY YEAR springs in below

narration: Here's the actual math. Put $500 extra a month toward your mortgage and you save $128,000 in interest. Invest that same $500 monthly and you end up with $1.13 million.
visual: Split screen: left panel shows house icon with $128K INTEREST SAVED fading in; right panel shows growing amber bar chart with $1.13M INVESTED BALANCE fading in; amber banner THAT'S A $1,000,000+ GAP

narration: There are only two valid reasons to pay early: your rate's above 8%, or you genuinely can't sleep with debt. Outside of that, 71% of homeowners are leaving a fortune on the table.
visual: Two checklist items spring in with amber checkmarks: RATE IS ABOVE 8% and CAN'T SLEEP WITH DEBT; then large red 71% stat animates in; row of seven person silhouettes — five in red

narration: If your rate's under 7%, your mortgage might be the cheapest debt you'll ever have. Invest the difference and your future self will thank you. Follow for more money math.
visual: Left card: gray house PAID OFF HOUSE $128K; right card: amber bar chart INVEST INSTEAD $1.13M grows taller; person silhouette with amber arrow pointing right; CTA banner FOLLOW FOR MORE MONEY MATH
